Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.impl.event

Class CdiExecutionListener

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.impl.event.AbstractCdiEventListener
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.impl.event.CdiEventListener
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.impl.event.CdiExecutionListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.delegate.DelegateListener<org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.delegate.DelegateExecution>, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.delegate.ExecutionListener, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.delegate.TaskListener
@Deprecated public class CdiExecutionListener extends CdiEventListener
Deprecated.
Backwards compatibility for old CdiExecutionListener usage.
Author:
Sebastian Menski
